'''âg-s-f''' ('''gasafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stammer|stammer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stammer|stammer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-s-f
|-
! Lemma
| gasafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gasafithi|gasafithi]] || [[word:gasafiji|gasafiji]] || [[word:gasafishi|gasafishi]] || [[word:gasafi|gasafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gasafuthuth|gasafuthuth]] || [[word:gasafujuj|gasafujuj]] || [[word:gasafushush|gasafushush]] || [[word:gasaf|gasaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gasafuthu|gasafuthu]] || [[word:gasafuju|gasafuju]] || [[word:gasafushu|gasafushu]] || [[word:gasafu|gasafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gasafufuth|gasafufuth]] || [[word:gasafufuj|gasafufuj]] || [[word:gasafufush|gasafufush]] || [[word:gasafuf|gasafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gasafethe|gasafethe]] || [[word:gasafeje|gasafeje]] || [[word:gasafeshe|gasafeshe]] || [[word:gasafe|gasafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gasafothoth|gasafothoth]] || [[word:gasafojoj|gasafojoj]] || [[word:gasafoshosh|gasafoshosh]] || [[word:gasaf|gasaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gasafotho|gasafotho]] || [[word:gasafojo|gasafojo]] || [[word:gasafosho|gasafosho]] || [[word:gasafo|gasafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gasafofoth|gasafofoth]] || [[word:gasafofoj|gasafofoj]] || [[word:gasafofosh|gasafofosh]] || [[word:gasafof|gasafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gasafĂŠthĂŠ|gasafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gasafĂŠjĂŠ|gasafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gasafĂŠshĂŠ|gasafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gasafĂŠ|gasafĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gasafathath|gasafathath]] || [[word:gasafajaj|gasafajaj]] || [[word:gasafashash|gasafashash]] || [[word:gasaf|gasaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gasafatha|gasafatha]] || [[word:gasafaja|gasafaja]] || [[word:gasafasha|gasafasha]] || [[word:gasafa|gasafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gasafafath|gasafafath]] || [[word:gasafafaj|gasafafaj]] || [[word:gasafafash|gasafafash]] || [[word:gasafaf|gasafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gasafasha|gasafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogasafasha|gogasafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigasafasha|gokigasafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gasafnĂŒsha|gasafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogasafnknĂŒsha|gogasafnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigasafnĂŒsha|gokigasafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gasafshĂ«sha|gasafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogasafnkshĂ«sha|gogasafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigasafshĂ«sha|gokigasafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gasafrosha|gasafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogasafnkrosha|gogasafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigasafrosha|gokigasafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gasafmusha|gasafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogasafnkmusha|gogasafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigasafmusha|gokigasafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gasafsherasha|gasafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogasafnksherasha|gogasafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigasafsherasha|gokigasafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gasafngasha|gasafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogasafnkngasha|gogasafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigasafngasha|gokigasafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gasafyasha|gasafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogasafnkyasha|gogasafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigasafyasha|gokigasafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gasafyamasha|gasafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogasafnkyamasha|gogasafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigasafyamasha|gokigasafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gasafnĂŒshĂ«sha|gasafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogasafnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gogasafnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigasafnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokigasafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gasafnĂŒrosha|gasafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogasafnknĂŒrosha|gogasafnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigasafnĂŒrosha|gokigasafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gasafnĂŒmusha|gasafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogasafnknĂŒmusha|gogasafnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigasafnĂŒmusha|gokigasafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gasafshĂ«nĂŒsha|gasafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogasafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gogasafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigasafshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokigasafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gasafshĂ«rosha|gasafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogasafnkshĂ«rosha|gogasafnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigasafshĂ«rosha|gokigasafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gasafshĂ«musha|gasafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogasafnkshĂ«musha|gogasafnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigasafshĂ«musha|gokigasafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gasafronĂŒsha|gasafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogasafnkronĂŒsha|gogasafnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigasafronĂŒsha|gokigasafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gasafroshĂ«sha|gasafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogasafnkroshĂ«sha|gogasafnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigasafroshĂ«sha|gokigasafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gasafromusha|gasafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogasafnkromusha|gogasafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigasafromusha|gokigasafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gasafmunĂŒsha|gasafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogasafnkmunĂŒsha|gogasafnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigasafmunĂŒsha|gokigasafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gasafmushĂ«sha|gasafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogasafnkmushĂ«sha|gogasafnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigasafmushĂ«sha|gokigasafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gasafmurosha|gasafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogasafnkmurosha|gogasafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigasafmurosha|gokigasafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gasaf|gasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:gĂŠsĂŠf|gĂŠsĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogasaf|hogasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hogĂŠsĂŠf|hogĂŠsĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogasaf|hohogasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogĂŠsĂŠf|hohogĂŠsĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒgasaf|nĂŒgasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒgĂŠsĂŠf|nĂŒgĂŠsĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgasaf|nĂŒnĂŒgasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠsĂŠf|nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠsĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻgasaf|nĂŻgasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻgĂŠsĂŠf|nĂŻgĂŠsĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgasaf|nĂŻnĂŻgasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠsĂŠf|nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠsĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugasaf|lugasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lugĂŠsĂŠf|lugĂŠsĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugasaf|lulugasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugĂŠsĂŠf|lulugĂŠsĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligasaf|ligasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ligĂŠsĂŠf|ligĂŠsĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligasaf|liligasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligĂŠsĂŠf|liligĂŠsĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogasaf|kogasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kogĂŠsĂŠf|kogĂŠsĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogasaf|kokogasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogĂŠsĂŠf|kokogĂŠsĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegasaf|kegasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kegĂŠsĂŠf|kegĂŠsĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegasaf|kekegasaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegĂŠsĂŠf|kekegĂŠsĂŠf]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
